Prof. Dr. Lecturer. Prof. Dr. Özge Uzun Kazmacı TUBITAK 3005 Project Support

One of our academicians at the Faculty of Law, Dr. Assist. Prof. Dr. Özge Uzun Kazmacı’s project titled “Determining the Effect and Economic Contribution of Family Constitution, Family Foundation and Trust Institutions as Legal Instruments on the Continuity of Family Companies” has been entitled to be supported within the scope of TÜBİTAK 3005 – Innovative Solutions in Social Sciences and Humanities Program.

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Esra Hamamcıoğlu and Assoc. Prof. Dr. Argun Karamanlıoğlu are involved in the project as Researchers.

We congratulate Ms. Özge and wish success to the project team.
